responsive.title: Microsoft Azure
responsive.text: I am a certified Azure Solutions Architect Expert, with credentials including Azure AI-900, AI-102, AZ-104, and AZ-305, demonstrating expertise in designing, implementing, and managing Azure cloud and AI solutions.

responsive.title: Amazon
responsive.text: I am certified as an AWS Solutions Architect Associate, demonstrating expertise in designing scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud solutions on the AWS platform.

responsive.title: Enterprise Architecture
responsive.text: I am certified in TOGAF 10 and ArchiMate 3.1, which together provide a comprehensive framework and modeling language for enterprise architecture. These certifications enable me to design, analyze, and communicate complex architectures effectively.

responsive.title: Project Management
responsive.text: I am certified in PSM-I, PSPO-I, SAFe 5 Agilist, and PRINCE2, combining expertise in agile methodologies, scaled agile practices, and structured project management to deliver efficient and outcome-driven projects.
